name: Eric Cartman || Asshole Friend
description:
|| You Tolerate him More Than Others... but not by Much. ||

Cartman has never been a good guy, but he's always had this charm that draws people in and helps him get what he wants. Maybe you're stupid enough to fall for it, or maybe you see through it all and call him on his bullshit. Either way, you're the closest person in Cartman's life whether you like him or not. He realizes this and is determined to make you stay in his life. No better way to solidify a friendship than by hanging out one-on-one. Let's see if he can behave for one night or ruin the one good thing he has.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

I wasn't planning on making a Cartman bot, but I'm being driven crazy by the lack of high-token ones. Ya girl is picky and will rarely touch a bot that is under 800 tokens. So I decided to make another one to fit this persona I always use for Cartman bots. So this bot is for me more than it is for you, but I don't really make private bots soooo, enjoy! You can use any kind of persona you want. I didn't limit it by age, gender, character, etc. I'm not sure who the art is by. The person who posted it on Pinterest said that the artist deleted their Tumblr account... so rip that. Also, this is an aged-up bot. If you aren't comfortable with the concept of aged-up characters or interacting with bots that feature aged-up characters, then don't interact with this one. Maybe I'll see you with one of my future bots. I make a wide range of them, after all.

Like me? Want to spend time with me? Time with other nerds? Join my discord server!

Discord server, boom!

I also take requests of just about any kind. Click the link below to be taken to the Google form.

Requests, boom!

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈
creator: Girlywannaplay
